key_risks: Surprise in June employment report leading to rate volatility
Reversal in recent small-cap and value momentum

portfolio.rationale: Recent outperformance and sensitivity to domestic growth and potential rate stability.
Upcoming bank earnings and resilient consumer income data support sector positioning.
Strong recent relative returns and defensive characteristics amid mixed macro data.
Positive 30-day relative performance and exposure to domestic demand trends.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward value, financials, healthcare, and industrials to capture relative strength and earnings catalysts within the one-month window while avoiding recent underperformers in growth and tech.
rationale_summary: Allocations emphasize areas with recent benchmark outperformance and near-term data or earnings sensitivity over the July horizon.
